dialogueChunks.intro: The situation just became far more dangerous, {player_name}. Our assumptions were built on sand.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The information we acted on was wrong. Not just incomplete: actively wrong. {target_npc} uncovered that the original report about {quest_focus_the} was based on tampered evidence. The real situation {location_hint} is nothing like what we were told. We need {quest_item} from the site to understand the full picture.
dialogueChunks.outro: We built our strategy on a lie. Now we need to tear it down and start over before everything collapses on us.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the people we tried to protect are now in greater danger because of what we did.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Our actions based on {quest_focus_the} provoked a retaliation nobody expected. The settlement blames us for stirring things up, and they're not entirely wrong. {target_npc} has been trying to negotiate a ceasefire {location_hint}. Find them and help de-escalate before this spirals further.
dialogueChunks.outro: We meant well. That doesn't undo the harm. But maybe we can still prevent {quest_threat_the} from spiraling beyond recovery.

dialogueChunks.intro: We were played, {player_name}. Deliberately, expertly played.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} found documents {location_hint} that prove the false information about {quest_focus_the} was planted intentionally. Someone wanted us to act rashly, to turn our attention the wrong way while they moved on {quest_stakes_the} unopposed. We need {quest_item} from the site where the deception was staged.
dialogueChunks.outro: We didn't make a mistake: we were led into one. And the puppeteer is still pulling strings.
